market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Penthouse Near NEC – 16% Below Avg Rate
Top‑Floor Suite, 4 Guests, Walk to BHX & HS2
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your top‑floor penthouse suite, perfectly positioned just minutes from the NEC, Birmingham Airport (BHX) and the new HS2 station. This entire‑home accommodation comfortably sleeps up to four guests, offering a spacious bedroom, a modern bathroom, and an open‑plan living area with floor‑to‑ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light. Enjoy a fully equipped kitchen, high‑speed Wi‑Fi, and a cosy lounge perfect for relaxing after a day of meetings or exploring the city. 

Rated 4.96 from 98 glowing reviews, our guests consistently praise the immaculate condition, thoughtful layout, and unbeatable location. At £130 per night, you’re paying 16% less than the city’s median nightly rate of £154.60, yet you already have a 72.8% booking rate for the next 90 days – only 24 nights remain open. Whether you’re traveling for business at the NEC, catching a flight from BHX, or hopping on the HS2, everything you need is just a short walk away. 

Book now and experience a premium stay that combines comfort, convenience, and exceptional value, all under one roof.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution shot of the living area showing the panoramic view from the top floor as the cover photo; it instantly highlights the ‘penthouse’ feel and the property’s prime location.
key_diagnosis: Revise the title to spotlight the 16% price advantage (£130 vs £154.60 median) and key transport links, increasing click‑through rates.
Create a compelling 200‑300 word description that includes the 4.96 rating, 98 reviews, capacity for 4 guests, and proximity to NEC, BHX, and HS2 to improve conversion.
Add high‑value amenities – a balcony, guest parking, and a TV/streaming setup – to match market expectations and justify the price.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £130/night rate is 16% below the market median, yet you’re already booking 73% of your calendar in the next 90 days.
